name: Cucumber Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the lime gelatin in 1 cup of hot water until it is fully dissolved.
2. Allow the mixture to cool completely before proceeding.
3. Add the grated cucumber and onion to the cooled gelatin mixture.
4. Fold in the sour cream, cottage cheese, and mayonnaise until all ingredients are well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into a 6-cup mold.
6. Refrigerate for at least four hours before serving.
